## Summary

Deploy the existing **`score-registry`** Soroban contract to **Stellar testnet**, configure the ZCore API oracle, and verify end-to-end attestation from the dapp.

**Current state:** Contract source and server integration exist in repo; `GET /api/contracts/config` returns `{ "enabled": false }` because no contract ID is configured in production.

---

## Prerequisites

- [Stellar CLI](https://developers.stellar.org/docs/tools/cli) installed (`stellar contract build`)
- Testnet account funded with XLM (Friendbot: https://laboratory.stellar.org/#account-creator?network=test)
- Separate **oracle keypair** for attestation (not your personal wallet — store secret only in Vercel env)
- Rust toolchain for Soroban build

---

## Contract overview

**Path:** `Contracts/score-registry/src/lib.rs`

| Function | Caller | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| `init(admin)` | Deployer | Set oracle admin address (once) |
| `set_score(wallet, score, tier)` | Admin | Write attestation |
| `get_score(wallet)` | Anyone | Read `ScoreRecord` |
| `admin()` | Anyone | Read admin address |

**Tier codes:** 0=REJECTED, 1=C, 2=B, 3=A  
**Score range:** 0–850 (panics if exceeded)

**Build:**
```bash
cd Contracts/score-registry
stellar contract build
# WASM: target/wasm32v1-none/release/score_registry.wasm
```

---

## Deployment steps

### 1. Deploy WASM to testnet

```bash
stellar contract deploy \
  --wasm target/wasm32v1-none/release/score_registry.wasm \
  --source <DEPLOYER_SECRET> \
  --network testnet
```

Save the returned **contract ID** (`C...`).

### 2. Initialize with oracle admin public key

The admin must match the public key of `ORACLE_SECRET_KEY` used by the API.

```bash
stellar contract invoke \
  --id <CONTRACT_ID> \
  --source <ORACLE_SECRET> \
  --network testnet \
  -- init --admin <ORACLE_PUBLIC_G_ADDRESS>
```

### 3. Configure ZCore API (Vercel + local)

**Project:** `zcore-api` (root dir `Server/`)

| Env var | Value |
|---------|-------|
| `SCORE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ID` | `C...` from deploy |
| `ORACLE_SECRET_KEY` | `S...` oracle secret (never commit) |
| `SOROBAN_RPC_URL` | `https://soroban-testnet.stellar.org` |
| `STELLAR_NETWORK` | `testnet` |

Reference: `Server/.env.example`, `Server/src/services/soroban.service.ts`

### 4. Redeploy API

```bash
cd Server && vercel --prod
```

### 5. Verify

```bash
# Config enabled
curl https://zcore-api.vercel.app/api/contracts/config

# After registering + attesting a user:
curl https://zcore-api.vercel.app/api/user/G.../on-chain
```

**Dapp:** https://dapp-zcore.vercel.app/dashboard/attestation
- Sign challenge → attest → see tx link + on-chain score

---

## Server code map

| File | Function |
|------|----------|
| `soroban.service.ts` | `getContractConfig()`, `readOnChainScore()`, `attestScoreOnChain()` |
| `contracts.controller.ts` | HTTP handlers |
| `tierToCode()` / `tierCodeToLabel()` | Tier mapping |

Attestation uses oracle keypair to sign Soroban tx calling `set_score`.

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Contract deployed to testnet; ID recorded in `Contracts/README.md`
- [ ] `init(admin)` called successfully
- [ ] Vercel env vars set for `zcore-api`
- [ ] `GET /api/contracts/config` → `enabled: true`
- [ ] Manual attest from dapp succeeds; tx visible on [Stellar Expert testnet](https://stellar.expert/explorer/testnet)
- [ ] `GET /api/user/{wallet}/on-chain` returns score matching DB
- [ ] Oracle secret not in git history

---

## Troubleshooting

| Error | Fix |
|-------|-----|
| Simulation failed | Check RPC URL, contract ID, network passphrase |
| Admin auth failed | `init` admin must match oracle public key |
| 503 on attest | Missing env vars or unfunded oracle account |
| Score 0 on-chain | User never attested; default empty record |

---
